rationale: The citing paper is about mobile-vs-nonmobile review cues and effort/credibility in review evaluation, while the cited paper studies traditional vs social earned media effects on sales in a different context (Kiva), so the overlap appears to be mainly broad WOM/UGC background. With only a single DOI match and no in-text citation context, there is insufficient evidence to confidently classify this as either clearly substantive or clearly incidental mention-only.
